title: Copper Revisioned
body:
- About the Mod -

Copper Revisioned is a mod aimed to add new features to Copper, many of the features are ideas from the BloxyMath comment section on the "Making my own Minecraft Update" Series.

 

- Features -

So, what are these new features?

You can find the videos showcasing the features down below (Part 2 is a lot better edited and explains the features better, In My Opinion)

(Im not sure how to embed videos from YouTube to Modrinth, I apologize so here are some links instead)

"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FBwweG-VOI0" and "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bS0R-aZ8eTg"

 

- Other Details -

The mod can be put on any mod pack, both for personal and commercial use.

The mod is made with Mcreator and Blockbench.

- Features but Text -
If you are more to reading about the features, here it is. Meet the Copper Golem, here are some keypoints about it!

- The Copper Golem can be summoned using Copper Blocks, similar to the Iron Golem. - Copper Golems are stronger than Normal Iron Golems. - In rainy or thunderous weather, there is a chance for Copper Golems to turn into Oxidized Copper Golems. - Oxidized Copper Golems become frozen and cannot move or perform any actions. - Oxidized Copper Golems are solid like a block and need to be scraped off to revert to their normal form. - To decrease the chance of Copper Golems oxidizing, a honey block can be used to wax them. - Waxing the Copper Golems allows them to only oxidize during thunderstorms and with a lower probability. - Oxidized Copper Golems, like Lightning rods, attract lightning but to a lesser extent. - When an Oxidized Copper Golem is struck by lightning, it transforms back into a normal Copper Golem. Meet the Copper Trident, crafted by putting a Trident and Copper Ingot into a Smithing Table! - The Copper Trident is a unique weapon that combines the characteristics of a sword and a trident. - Loyalty and Riptide enchantments, typically applicable to tridents, do not work with the Copper Trident. - The Copper Trident provides a slight reach buff to the player, allowing them to hit targets up to 3.5 blocks away instead of the usual 3 blocks. - A new enchantment called "Thor's Gift" can be applied to the Copper Trident. - With the Thor's Gift enchantment, the player can absorb lightning during thunderstorms and use it to inflict additional damage on enemies. - The level of the Thor's Gift enchantment determines the amount of damage dealt and the duration of setting the enemy on fire. (The higher the enchantment level, the higher damage you will deal and the duration of fire) Meet the Copper TNT, an all-new TNT! - The Copper TNT is more powerful than the regular TNT, with an explosion power of 5 instead of the normal 4. - When Copper TNT is set off in a chain reaction, there is a very small delay between each explosion, unlike the regular TNT. - To craft Copper TNT, surround a TNT block with 4 Copper Ingots in the Crafting Table.
